sketches.mechanism: A deleted copy constructor makes any attempt to pass the object by value ill-formed at compile time.
sketches.resonance: What belongs to one body cannot be handed intact to another.

sketches.mechanism: Negation as failure allows a goal to succeed precisely because the system cannot prove another goal.
sketches.resonance: Loss becomes true not by evidence, but by the failure to find.

sketches.mechanism: Erlang variables are single-assignment pattern matches, so matching an already-bound variable against a different atom raises badmatch.
sketches.resonance: A name once bound to forever cannot be made to leave without breaking the world.
sketches.draft:
-module(vow).
-export([bind/0]).

bind() ->
    Forever = forever,
    Forever = leaving,
    Forever.
